issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Buzzy
products.tagline: Your creative AI co-director
products.summaryZh: 你的创意AI联合导演
products.descriptionZh: Buzzy 是首款真正具备自主能力的无限画布视频创作工具。它能激发创意灵感、构建情绪板，并一键精准编辑视频——在统一工作空间中，可制作不限长度的商业大片与广告，保持无限数量的主体一致性，控制光线与镜头角度，像操作 Photoshop 一样精准编辑视频。
products.description: Buzzy is the first truly agentic infinite canvas for video creation. It helps you spark ideas, build moodboards, and precisely photoshop your video in one click — while creating unlimited-length blockbuster films and commercial ads, keeping unlimited subjects consistent, controlling lighting and camera angles, and precisely editing video like photoshop in one workspace.

products.name: Humalike x Hermes
products.tagline: Social intelligence plugin for Hermes Agent
products.summaryZh: Hermes Agent 社交智能插件
products.descriptionZh: 一条指令赋予你的Hermes代理社交智能。它能判断何时发言、适应群聊语气，并记住谁说了什么。适用于Slack、Telegram和WhatsApp的群组聊天。
products.description: One command gives your Hermes agent social intelligence. It decides when to speak, adapts to your group's tone and remembers who said what. Works in group chats on Slack, Telegram and WhatsApp.

products.name: Migma AI
products.tagline: AI runs your email marketing. Better with every send.
products.summaryZh: AI驱动你的邮件营销。每次发送，都更出色。
products.descriptionZh: Migma在你提出要求之前就能创建完整的营销活动。它能理解你的目标和事件，生成每一封邮件，进行个性化与本地化处理，并在不同收件箱中保持一致的呈现效果。它负责发送、偏好设置和合规性管理，随后学习哪些因素能推动收入增长。
products.description: Migma creates full campaigns before you ask. It understands your goals and events, creates every email, personalizes and localizes it, and renders consistently across inboxes. It handles sending, preferences and compliance, then learns what drives revenue.

products.name: Kastra
products.tagline: Runtime authorization for Claude, Cursor, Codex and OpenClaw
products.summaryZh: Claude、Cursor、Codex 和 OpenClaw 的运行时授权
products.descriptionZh: Kastra 是 AI 智能体的运行时授权层。它在动作执行前决定智能体可以做什么、不可以做什么，以低于 1 毫秒的延迟在工具、提示词、输入和输出之间强制执行策略。使用单一控制平面，即可在 Claude Code、Cursor、Codex、OpenClaw、Anthropic SDK、OpenAI SDK 等环境中管理智能体和策略。在未经授权的工具使用、提示词注入和敏感数据泄露演变为安全事件之前加以阻止。信任规则，而非智能体。
products.description: Kastra is the runtime authorization layer for AI agents. It decides what agents can and cannot do before actions execute, enforcing policies with sub-1 ms latency across tools, prompts, inputs, and outputs. Use one control plane to govern agents and policies across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenClaw, the Anthropic SDK, the OpenAI SDK, and more. Prevent unauthorized tool use, prompt injection, and exposure of sensitive data before they become incidents. Trust the rules, not the agents.

products.name: box
products.tagline: Simple computers for agent w/ full VMs
products.summaryZh: 为智能体设计的简易计算机，配备完整虚拟机
products.descriptionZh: Box为智能体提供最简单、最便宜的云计算机，专为智能体平台与软件工厂的构建者设计。在终端输入'box new'，2秒内即可获得一台功能强大的Ubuntu虚拟机，拥有管理员权限、桌面环境和SSH访问。每小时仅需0.036美元，比E2B、Daytona、Modal等同类产品便宜10倍，因此您可以运行更多智能体，或延长其运行时间。支持完全自助式运行最多1000个并发Box，如需更多资源，可联系创始人团队，当日即可获得支持。
products.description: Box offers the simplest, cheapest cloud computers for agents, thought for builders of agentic platforms & software factories. Run 'box new' in your terminal, in 2s get a beefy ubuntu VM, with admin rights, a desktop, ssh access. At $0.036/hr it is 10x less expensive than the likes of E2B, Daytona, Modal, so you can run more agents, or run them longer. Run up to 1000 concurrent boxes fully self-served, or ask us for more, with same-day support from the founders.

products.name: ACME.BOT
products.tagline: No-slop AI SEO agent that interviews you first
products.summaryZh: 无废话AI SEO代理，先与你进行访谈
products.descriptionZh: ACME.BOT 将你的专业知识转化为无冗余的SEO文章。在手机上回答几个关于某个主题的问题，你的第一手经验将塑造你的博客文章。AI处理枯燥的部分，如关键词研究、插图、参考文献、内部链接和发布节奏。创建有用且非同质化的内容，同时满足Google的EEAT要求。
products.description: ACME.BOT turns your expertise into no slop SEO articles. Answer a few questions on a topic (from your phone) and your first-hand experience shapes your blog post. AI handles the boring stuff. Like keyword research, illustrations, references, internal linking, and publishing cadence. Create helpful non-commodity content that also satisfies Google's EEAT requirements.

products.name: Gemini 3.6 Flash Family
products.tagline: Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
products.summaryZh: Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite 及 3.5 Flash Cyber
products.descriptionZh: 我们推出全新Gemini模型，包括Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite和3.5 Flash Cyber。最新Gemini模型在效率、延迟和可靠性方面实现突破，助力大规模构建AI智能体。
products.description: We’re introducing new Gemini models, including Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite and 3.5 Flash Cyber. Our newest Gemini models deliver the efficiency, latency, and reliability to build AI agents at scale.

products.name: MonoCloud for Startups
products.tagline: One identity layer for your customers, APIs, and agents
products.summaryZh: 为您的客户、API和代理提供统一的身份层
products.descriptionZh: MonoCloud 是为您的客户、API 和智能体提供的统一身份层。多数工具止步于登录框，而我们超越登录，深入授权与问责：精确决定每个用户、服务和AI智能体可访问的内容，证明其操作行为，并能在瞬间撤销权限。细粒度Cedar授权、通行密钥与单点登录、API保护、机器间通信，以及基于证书绑定的mTLS，全部集成于一个平台。初创企业可免费使用完整平台一年。
products.description: MonoCloud is one identity layer for your customers, your APIs, and your agents. Most tools stop at a login box. We go past login into authorization and accountability: decide exactly what every user, service, and AI agent can access, prove what it did, and revoke it in an instant. Fine-grained Cedar authorization, passkeys and SSO, API protection, M2M, and mTLS with certificate-bound trust, all on one platform. Startups get the full platform free for one year.

products.name: Trovio For Brands
products.tagline: Communities love your brand - Our AI team finds them for you
products.summaryZh: 社区热爱你的品牌——我们的AI团队为你找到它们
products.descriptionZh:
一位值了十小时班的护士，比任何运动员都更能推销你的蛋白棒。大型创作者主导转化率的时代已经过去。如今，人们从自己信任的人那里购买：那些小而紧密、值得信赖的社群。Trovio 能找到这些社群，以及其中真正使用并需要你产品的影响者。  
- 数秒内匹配社群中的影响者  
- 发布需求、设定条款，其余交给我们  
- 完整的分析与转化追踪  
信任带来转化，触达不能。
products.description: A nurse on hour ten of her shift sells your protein bar better than any athlete. Gone are the days when mega creators moved the needle on conversion. Today people buy from who they trust: small, close-knit trusted communities. Trovio finds those communities, and their influencers who actually use and need your product. - Influencers matched on community in seconds - Post a brief, set terms, and we handle the rest - Full analytics and conversion tracking Trust converts. Reach doesn't.

products.name: Arkor
products.tagline: Fine-tune and Deploy Open-weight Models in TypeScript
products.summaryZh: 在TypeScript中微调与部署开放权重模型
products.descriptionZh: 10分钟内启动真正的LLM训练。向Claude Code或Codex说明模型用途，它们会准备数据集并创建训练项目。在本地工作室中点击"运行训练"，Arkor执行训练并将训练好的模型部署为兼容OpenAI的API。将微调视为Next.js和Vercel：代码可审查，基础设施无需管理，模型可供应用调用。无需配置GPU，无需机器学习专业知识，无需编写Python训练代码。
products.description: Start a real LLM training in 10 minutes. Tell Claude Code or Codex what the model is for; they prepare the datasets and create the training project. Click "Run Training" in the local studio. Arkor runs the training, and deploys the trained model as an OpenAI-compatible API. Think Next.js and Vercel for fine-tuning: code you can review, infrastructure you do not have to manage, and a model your app can call. No GPU setup. No ML expertise required. No Python training code to write.

products.name: AgentManager
products.tagline: Never miss a Claude Code session waiting for your input
products.summaryZh: 不错过任何等待你输入的 Claude Code 会话。
products.descriptionZh: 每个Claude Code会话的浮动macOS窗口。当需要你的输入时，它会浮现——一切就绪时则隐藏。一键跳转到精确终端。原生Swift编写，已公证，7天免费试用。
products.description: A floating macOS window for every Claude Code session. The moment one needs your input, it surfaces — and hides when all is clear. Jump to the exact terminal in one click. Native Swift, notarized, 7-day free trial.

products.name: Grindoro
products.tagline: Focus with others through synchronized Pomodoro sessions
products.summaryZh: 通过同步番茄钟与他人一起专注
products.descriptionZh: Grindoro 是一款番茄钟专注应用，让高效工作不再孤单。加入同步专注时段，将习惯与目标转化为任务，管理每日咖啡能量，并收集每周咖啡馆作为坚持的证明。
products.description: Grindoro is a Pomodoro focus app that makes productivity feel less lonely. Join synchronized focus sessions, turn habits and goals into tasks, manage your daily coffee energy, and collect weekly cafés as proof of your consistency.

products.name: Redential
products.tagline: A developer credential that proves what you built, NDA safe.
products.summaryZh: 开发者凭证，证明你的构建成果，且符合保密协议要求。
products.descriptionZh: 你最好的作品可能签了保密协议，没人能看到。简历早已无人信任，造假太容易。Redential 会在你的本地机器上读取 Git 历史，将其转化为你实际构建内容的档案。你的代码始终不会泄露，分享前你也能清楚看到具体内容。随后你进行实时答辩，回答关于自己工作的问题。结果就是：一份比简历更值得招聘方信赖的凭证。CLI 免费且开源。
products.description: Your best work is probably under an NDA, so nobody can see it. Nobody trusts CVs anymore, they are so fakeable. Redential reads your git history on your own machine and turns it into a profile of what you actually built. Never your code, and you see exactly what gets shared before it does. Then you defend it live, answering questions about your own work. The result: a credential recruiters can trust more than a CV. The CLI is free and open source.

products.name: Lattics
products.tagline: Brain-like knowledge base with AI writing & deep research
products.summaryZh: 类脑知识库，集成AI写作与深度研究功能
products.descriptionZh: 三年前，我们推出了Lattics，一款面向写作者和研究者的“类脑”知识管理工具。如今，我们带来了更重要的升级——深度融入研究与创作流程的AI辅助写作功能。*** Product Hunt专属7折优惠，限前50名 *** 请通过链接获取折扣码：https://lattics.com/specialoffer/7fGKwQZEhV，即可获得Lattics Pro的7折优惠码。
products.description: Three years ago, we launched Lattics as a "brain-like" knowledge management tool for writers and researchers. Today, we're back with something much bigger — AI-assisted writing that's deeply integrated into your research and creative workflow. *** 30% OFF DISCOUNT for Produnct Hunt, Limited for 50 *** Please check the discount code in the link :https://lattics.com/specialoffer/7fGKwQZEhV, You will get 30% discount code of Lattics Pro

products.name: AI Agents in Chat
products.tagline: Your Chat UI Just Got an AI Roommate
products.summaryZh: 你的聊天界面多了个AI室友
products.descriptionZh: 你的AI代理应融入你已构建的聊天界面。CometChat的iOS UI工具包让你将现有消息体验转化为AI对话，支持流式响应、聊天历史记录以及完全可定制的内置UI。连接你的代理，匹配品牌风格，无需从头构建AI聊天即可发布。
products.description: Your AI agent belongs in the chat you already built. CometChat's iOS UI Kit lets you turn your existing messaging experience into an AI conversation with streaming responses, chat history, and a fully customizable UI built in. Connect your agent, match your brand, and ship without building AI chat from scratch.

products.name: AGINE Academy
products.tagline: A story-driven game for learning Claude by doing
products.summaryZh: 一款通过实践学习Claude的剧情驱动游戏
products.descriptionZh: AGINE Academy 将学习 Claude 变成一场故事驱动的游戏。你在 Claude 中完成真实任务，涵盖桌面自动化、Claude Code 以及你自己的产品，每节课都配有专属 AI 导师。每节课都会为你留下一个可用的成果。
products.description: AGINE Academy makes learning Claude a story-driven game. You finish real missions inside Claude, from Desktop automations to Claude Code and your own products, with an AI mentor kept to each lesson. Every lesson leaves you a working result.

products.name: Light Flip
products.tagline: Nostalgia for a time before smartphones
products.summaryZh: 对智能手机时代之前的怀念
products.descriptionZh: Light 是一家与众不同的科技公司。我们设计尊重并赋能用户的精美工具，首款产品是 The Light Phone。
products.description: Light is a radically different technology company. We design beautiful tools that respect and empower our users and our first product is The Light Phone.

products.name: Overflight
products.tagline: Identify every aircraft in your sky.
products.summaryZh: 识别你天空中的每一架飞机。
products.descriptionZh: 头顶天空的实时雷达视图。你实际能看到的每一架飞机，都被标注出来，包含航空公司、航班号、航线、高度以及观看方向。iPhone和iPad随身携带，Apple TV可作为常亮环境显示屏。免费使用，航线功能需升级Pro。
products.description: A live radar scope of the sky above you. Every aircraft you can actually see, plotted, with airline, flight number, route, altitude, and which way to look. iPhone and iPad in your pocket, Apple TV as an always-on ambient display. Free, with Pro for routes.

products.name: Garmin CIRQA™ Smart Band
products.tagline: The screenless health + fitness tracker with no subscription
products.summaryZh: 无屏幕的健康+健身追踪器，无需订阅
products.descriptionZh: CIRQA™ Smart Band是一款无屏幕智能手环，可自动检测活动，具备全天候健康监测、压力追踪功能，续航时间长达10天。
products.description: CIRQA™ Smart Band is a screenless smart band that can automatically detect activities, has 24/7 health monitoring, stress tracking, and up to 10 days of battery.

products.name: UltraPod
products.tagline: Turn your old iPhone into a music-first dumbphone
products.summaryZh: 把你的旧iPhone变成一台以音乐为主的极简手机
products.descriptionZh: UltraPod 将旧款 iPhone 转化为以音乐为核心的功能手机，同时保留现代设备中有用的部分。支持 Apple Music 流媒体播放、HealthKit 健身记录、阅读、相机及本地基础工具，去除社交信息流和注意力陷阱。它是为希望进行数字排毒、又无需额外购买硬件的用户打造的专注日常伴侣。
products.description: UltraPod turns an old iPhone into a music-first dumbphone without abandoning the useful parts of a modern device. Stream with Apple Music, keep HealthKit workouts, reading, camera, and essential local tools, while stripping away social feeds and attention traps. It is a focused daily companion for people who want a digital detox without buying another piece of hardware.
